title: Fees & Funding
intro: Our classes are subsidised through the Ministry of Education's Out-of-Hours Music Programme, keeping costs accessible for all families.

fee_box.label: Annual Tuition Fee
fee_box.period: per student, per year (all four terms)
items: One instrument class per week (30 mins)
All term dates included in the fee
Choir is free — no extra charge
Subsidised by the Ministry of Education
Managed via ClubHub for easy payments

notes.heading: Subsidised programme
notes.body: Gallery Music Centre is part of the Ministry of Education's out-of-hours programme. This means classes are kept at a very low cost compared to private music tuition.

notes.heading: Sibling discounts
notes.body: We welcome whole families — please contact us to discuss fees if you have multiple children enrolling.

notes.heading: Waitlists
notes.body: Keyboard and guitar classes often have significant waitlists. We recommend getting in touch early. Orchestra and pre-instrumental classes may have spaces available.

notes.heading: Payments
notes.body: Fees are managed through ClubHub. Please keep your details up to date and use ClubHub to manage your family contributions.
